# Paths excluded from the trufflehog secret scan (--exclude-paths).
# One path regex per line.
#
# test-projects/ holds E2E fixtures whose brik.yml embeds the lab's documented
# Gitea credentials in GitOps/evidence repo URLs (e.g.
# http://brik:Brik-Gitea-2026@gitea.briklab.test/...). These are local-lab
# fixtures published in the README, not real secrets. Setup scripts and the rest
# of the repo are still scanned.
^test-projects/
